No South Africa-specific MRBP isolate data published. CDC (2025) notes global MRBP spread primarily from China; PAHO (2025) reports cases in Americas. Systematic review (Antibiotics 2022;11:1570) confirms sporadic cases outside China. No African MRBP reports in accessible literature. Conservative low anchor retained with slightly elevated point estimate reflecting global importation risk.

CDC surveillance abstract: 1208 B. pertussis isolates collected from 2011-2015 across 7 enhanced-surveillance states, 2 outbreak states, and 6 sporadic-state settings were susceptible to erythromycin and azithromycin; 54 DNA NPS extracts had no A2047G mutation.
